english: nothing but a smart thought of that learned author.
another mystical formula, used e. g. for transforming the mi-gtsaṅ-ba bcu (mi gtsang ba bcu) into bdud-rtsi (bdud rtsi), v. the explanation given under naṅ-mčód (nang mchod).
Sch.: propping one's chin on both fists, 'õ-tsúgs mdzad (oM tshugs mdzad) Mil.
throat, neck, = lkog-ma (lkog ma); 'og-żó ('og zho) a beautiful white neck, a 'milk-neck' Glr.; 'og-skó ('og sko) prob. = 'os-sko ('os sko) Med.
a lamp, 'oṅ-rás ('ong ras) the wick of a lamp C.
W. resp. for 'a ('a), at your service! at your commands!

C. throat, windpipe, = 'ol-ldoṅ ('ol ldong); *'ól-ma dám-te sẹ́-pa* ('ol ma dam te se pa) to strangle, throttle; 'ol-rko ('ol rko), 'ol-goṅ ('ol gong), 'ol-kroṅ ('ol krong) id., or acc. to others = 'ol-mdud ('ol mdud) the fore-part of the larynx.
also *õ-ku* (om ku) C. the chin, resp. żal-ko (zhal ko).
